_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Metadata management involves establishing policies and processes that ensure data can be accessed across an organisation.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active metadata principles, automated lineage tracking, and business glossary governance.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.600), DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.582).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.586). Shared vocabulary: [data, management, metadata]. DDaT-only terms [accessed, across, ensure, establishing, involves, organisation] vs WIDAI-only terms [active, automated, business, catalog, glossary, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.876, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.1%). "Metadata management involves establishing policies and processes that ensure dat" and "Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active me" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.637 > STS 0.586 (gap +0.051). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, management, metadata] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [data, management, metadata]. DDaT-only: [accessed, across, ensure, establishing, involves, organisation]. WIDAI-only: [active, automated, business, catalog, glossary, governance].
